title: Classic DP
content:
# DSA Revision

*   **Floyd's Cycle Detector:** Meets at distance $A = C$ from head and meeting point back to entrance.
*   **Heapify Time Complexity:** Bottom-up heapify is $O(N)$; top-down insertions is $O(N \log N)$.
*   **DP Space Reduction:** Compressing 2D state arrays to 1D by iterating weight capacity backwards.


*   **Classic DP Complexity Reference:** Time $O(N)$, Space $O(1)$ auxiliary.
